teamObjective.explanation: Lead the 3 of diamonds. It is the safest opening lead, maximizes the probability partner can take control, and aligns with supporting a partner who is near finish.

partnerBelief.summary: Partner (player 2) has only 2 cards remaining, suggesting they are near finishing. They may have retained a high card or trump to escape, but their exact holdings are hidden and should be treated probabilistically.

opponentBelief.summary: Opponents (players 1 and 3) each have 3 cards and have revealed nothing. Given the opening state, they likely hold cards that can beat my 3-6 of diamonds and will try to seize control or block my partner.

actionRationale.primaryReason: Lead the 3 of diamonds. It is the safest opening lead, maximizes the probability partner can take control, and aligns with supporting a partner who is near finish.
